title: Non GATE CSE - IS and Software Engineering - Software Cost Estimation

questions.question:
Consider a project with the following functional units :

Number of user inputs = \( 50 \)

Number of user outputs = \( 40 \)

Number of user enquiries = \( 35 \)

Number of user files = \( 06 \)

Number of external interfaces = \( 04 \)

Assuming all complexity adjustment factors and weighing factors as average, the function points for the project will be



IS&Software Engineering: UGC NET CSE | June 2014 | Part 3 | Question: 18
